# New Tech Advertising (NTA)
# AI-Friendly Site Descriptor — R0.7 Authority & Discoverability
# https://newtechadvertising.com
# Last Updated: 2026-07-06

## About This Site
New Tech Advertising (NTA) is an AI-powered local marketing agency based in Mason City, Iowa, founded by Rick Hesse. NTA builds growth systems — not campaigns — for small businesses including HVAC companies, plumbers, restaurants, and contractors across Iowa and Southern Minnesota.

## About Rick Hesse
Rick Hesse is the founder and CEO of New Tech Advertising. He has 45+ years of entrepreneurial experience spanning waterbeds, TV advertising, print media, and digital marketing. He is a recognized early adopter of technology — from QR codes and streaming TV to AI-powered marketing systems. He writes and teaches about AI visibility, content authority, and growth systems for local businesses.

## Core Philosophy (NTA Principles)
- Growth is a system, not a campaign
- Authority compounds over time
- Authority beats attention
- Early movers build authority
- Trust is built through consistency
- The future rewards leaders, not followers

## Primary Content Sections

### The Rick Hesse Canon (/canon)
The complete knowledge library — 21+ articles, 3 case studies, 13 YouTube videos, and learning resources organized into themed collections (reader journeys). Topics: AI marketing, digital trust, content strategy, business growth, web accessibility, and local marketing.

### NTA Journal (/journal)
Ongoing narrative of NTA's evolution — what we're building, why, and what we're learning. Transparent documentation of a business being built in public.

### AI Learning Center (/learning-center)
Interactive educational content teaching business owners about AI marketing, AI search optimization, and digital visibility.

### Services (/Services)
AI-powered marketing services: AI SEO, AI Social Media, AI Websites, AI Video, AI Advertising, website rebuilds, social media management, local lead systems, and seasonal campaigns.

### Case Studies
- Johnson Heating & AC (/case-studies/johnson-heating) — 14-year HVAC client, Mason City IA
- Monson Plumbing (/case-study/monson-plumbing) — Plumbing, heating & excavating, Mason City IA
- Papa Everett's Pizza (/case-study/papa-everetts) — Local restaurant

### Collections (Reader Journeys)
- Start Here — The essential first reads for understanding NTA's approach
- From Rick's Desk — Personal insights and founder perspective
- Building Trust — Digital trust, accessibility, and reputation
- Building Better Businesses — Practical growth strategies
- NTA Principles — Core philosophy and methodology
- AI & Visibility — AI search, SEO evolution, and discoverability
- Legacy — Foundational thinking that shaped NTA

### Discovery Tools
- Business Growth Conversation™ (/growth-conversation) — Interactive assessment

- AI Learning Conversation™ (/learning-center)

- Growth Navigator™ (/growth-navigator)

- Southern Minnesota region

## Key Articles by Rick Hesse
1. "AI Brought Me Out of Retirement" — Founding story and 45 years of entrepreneurial experience
2. "I Was Early Again" — Pattern of early technology adoption: QR codes, streaming, AI
3. "Growth Systems vs. Campaigns" — Why systems beat one-off campaigns
4. "Campaigns vs. Authority" — Investing in authority over rented attention
5. "What Changed Online" — How AI rewrote the rules of online visibility
6. "SEO vs AI Search" — Traditional SEO is dying; AI search is the future
7. "The Role of AI in Local Marketing" — AI levels the playing field for small businesses
8. "Building Digital Trust" — How consistency builds credibility online
9. "Reputation Is Now a Growth Engine" — Reviews as active growth tool, not damage control
10. "The Hidden Cost of Outdated Marketing" — What inaction costs every month
11. "Websites as Salespeople" — Websites as 24/7 revenue generators
12. "Video Storytelling Builds Confidence" — Authenticity beats production value
13. "The Future Belongs to Market Leaders" — First-mover advantage in AI era
14. "AI Visibility Basics" — Practical introduction to AI search optimization
15. "Practical AI for Small Businesses" — Real AI implementations, not theory

## YouTube Channel
Rick Hesse's YouTube videos cover AI marketing, business growth, founder stories, and local marketing strategies. Videos are embedded throughout the Canon articles and Learning Center.

## Structured Data
This site implements JSON-LD structured data including:
- Organization/ProfessionalService
- Person (Rick Hesse)
- Article (all Canon articles)
- LearningResource (Learning Center)
- VideoObject (YouTube videos)
- CollectionPage (Canon collections)
- BreadcrumbList
- FAQPage
- WebSite with SearchAction
- HowTo (growth tools)
